snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isn‚Äôt an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyone‚Äôs favorite activity, but it can be very messy ‚ÄĒ and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little one‚Äôs outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day won‚Äôt take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know.

0:31 ‚ÄĒ The pacifier hack 

2:42 ‚ÄĒ A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 ‚ÄĒ The getting along/best friends‚Äô shirt

But first, let‚Äôs try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. We‚Äôve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and here‚Äôs what we created. Aren‚Äôt 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. But first, let‚Äôs try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Watch until the end to discover some fantastic tricks and crafts you‚Äôll adore.

snippet.title: Tozkoparan ńįskender 8. B√∂l√ľm
snippet.description:
Ayberk‚Äôin telefonunu hacklemenin karŇüńĪlńĪńüńĪnda, Refika ceza olarak Mavi Ay‚ÄôńĪn telefonlarńĪna el koymuŇütur. Telefonsuz kalan Mavi Ay i√ßin iŇüler pek kolay gitmemektedir. Bu durumdan en √ßok Asya etkilenir. √úst√ľne √ľstl√ľk KasńĪrga √ľyeleri de Mavi Ay‚ÄôńĪ telefonsuzluk konusunda rahat bńĪrakmamaktadńĪr. Bu konuda arkadaŇülarńĪna g√∂re en rahat durumda olan kiŇüi ise ńįskender‚Äôdir. ńįskender Mavi Ay‚Äôa hayatńĪn telefonsuz da √ßok g√ľzel olduńüunu hatńĪrlatmanńĪn yollarńĪnńĪ arar.
Dińüer yandan zaman makinesinin tamiratńĪnńĪ tamamlamak √ľzere olan Fikri, Saniye‚Äônin makinenin √ľzerine √ßay d√∂kmesi ve makineyi patlatmasńĪyla yńĪkńĪlńĪr. Bu durumdan haberdar olan Giovanni de ge√ßmiŇüe d√∂nemeyeceńüini d√ľŇü√ľnerek Saniye‚Äôye sinir olur.
ńįskender, Mavi Ay‚ÄôńĪn neŇüesini yerine getirebilmek i√ßin sokak oyunlarńĪ oynamayńĪ teklif eder. ńįskender‚Äôe g√∂re sokak oyunlarńĪ telefon oyunlarńĪndan daha eńülenceli olacaktńĪr. KasńĪrga, sokak oyunlarńĪ oynamaya baŇülayan Mavi Ay‚Äôa sinir olur. Mavi Ay ve KasńĪrga arasńĪndaki gerilim s√ľrerken, R√ľya Hoca tarih dersinde LahanacńĪlar ve BamyacńĪlar adńĪnda iki takńĪmdan bahseder. ńįskender‚Äôin LahanacńĪlardan olduńüunu √∂ńürenen Mavi Ay LahanacńĪlarńĪ desteklerken, KasńĪrgacńĪlar BamyacńĪlardan olduklarńĪnńĪ s√∂yler ve atńĪŇüńĪrlar. snippet.title: Kuzey YńĪldńĪzńĪ IŐálk AsŐßk 51. BoŐąluŐąm Fragman
snippet.description:
Bu dizi ve √ßok daha fazlasńĪ puhutv'de ‚Üí https://puhutv.com/kuzey-yildizi-ilk-ask-detay?utm_medium=referral&utm_source=youtube&utm_campaign=kuzey_yildizi_ilk_ask&utm_content=detay

Kuzey YńĪldńĪzńĪ "ńįlk AŇük"a abone olmak i√ßin ‚Üí http://bit.ly/kzy-yldz-dd-sub

Kuzey‚Äôle YńĪldńĪz; bir k√∂pr√ľn√ľn √ľst√ľndeki iki inat√ßńĪ ke√ßi, aynńĪ denizin iki hńĪr√ßńĪn dalgasńĪdńĪr. YńĪldńĪz, Kuzey‚Äôi, kendini bildi bileli sevmektedir. Ondan baŇükasńĪnńĪ g√∂z√ľ g√∂rmemiŇütir. Aileler de birbirinin can dostu olduńüundan Kuzey‚Äôle YńĪldńĪz‚Äôa ivedilikle birer s√∂z y√ľz√ľńü√ľ takńĪlńĪr. Amma ve lakin, Kuzey, √ľniversite okumak i√ßin ńįstanbul‚Äôa gittińüinde t√ľm s√∂zlerini unutur, yeni aŇüklara yelken a√ßar.

Bu durum, ailesi ve YńĪldńĪz tarafńĪndan √∂ńürenildińüinde ise Kuzey, kendi ailesi dahil k√∂ydeki herkes tarafńĪndan aforoz edilir. ArtńĪk Kuzey‚Äôin ne bir memleketi, ne de bir ailesi vardńĪr. YńĪldńĪz, Kuzey‚Äôini, g√∂ńü√ľn√ľ ayakta tutan direńüini, bildińüi tek y√∂n√ľn√ľ kaybetmiŇü, kalbine √ßakńĪlan bir kazńĪkla √∂ylece kalakalmńĪŇü, bunun acńĪsńĪnńĪ, bir an olsun unutmamńĪŇütńĪr. 

Kuzey, aŇüńĪk olduńüu kadńĪnla evlenmiŇü, √ľ√ß √ßocuk sahibi olmuŇütur ama YńĪldńĪz‚Äôa yaŇüattńĪńüńĪnńĪ tam yirmi sene sonra yaŇüamńĪŇü, terk edilmiŇü; √ľstelik dolandńĪrńĪlńĪp sńĪfńĪr noktasńĪna gelmiŇütir. Kuzey, yńĪllar √∂nce binbir umutla geldińüi ve hayallerini, en g√ľzel g√ľnlerini yaŇüadńĪńüńĪ Ňüehri, √ľ√ß kńĪzńĪyla birlikte terk edip memleketine d√∂nmeye karar verir. 

KńĪzlarńĪyla birlikte kendisini dońüduńüu topraklara kabul ettirecek, ettiremese de gitmeyecek, orda kalacaktńĪr. Ama YńĪldńĪz, onu geldińüi yere g√∂ndermeye, onu d√∂nd√ľńü√ľne piŇüman etmeye yeminlidir. ńįŇüin i√ßine bir de biri gen√ß kadńĪnlńĪńüńĪn eŇüińüinde, biri ergenlińüin doruklarńĪnda, dińüeri de √ßocuk yaŇüta √ľ√ß tane kńĪz √ßocuńüu ve Kuzey y√ľz√ľnden birbirine d√ľŇüman olmuŇü iki aile eklenince olaylar kontrol edilemez bir hal alńĪr.

Kuzey gitmemeye, YńĪldńĪz affetmemeye, aileler de barńĪŇümamaya yeminlidir. Bu inat hikayesinden en √ßok inat eden, pes etmeyen galip √ßńĪkacaktńĪr. Ňěimdilik kimsenin pes etmeye niyeti yoktur.

snippet.title: Son Yaz 4. B√∂l√ľm | Sen Ańülama
snippet.description:
Son Yaz 4. B√∂l√ľm Tek Par√ßa
(22 Ocak 2021)

Halil Sadi, Akg√ľn‚Äôden Selim‚Äôin elindeki tanńĪk Latif CoŇükun‚Äôun yerini bulmasńĪnńĪ ister. KarŇüńĪlńĪńüńĪnda onun yurtdńĪŇüńĪna gitme isteńüini yerine getireceńüine s√∂z verir. Yańümur, Kaan‚Äôdan ayrńĪldńĪńüńĪ i√ßin √ľzg√ľnd√ľr. Kaan ise dańüńĪlmńĪŇü haldedir. Bu ayrńĪlńĪk iki anneyi karŇüńĪ karŇüńĪya getirecektir. Bu arada Metin, Serap‚ÄôńĪn kendisine tepkili olduńüunu fark eder ve nedenini √∂ńürenmeye √ßalńĪŇüńĪr. Selim ise yokluńüunda Fatih‚Äôin kendi ailesiyle √ßok i√ß i√ße olmasńĪnńĪ i√ßine sindirememektedir. √úst√ľne Fatih‚Äôin Canan‚Äôa iŇü teklifini de duyunca deliye d√∂ner ve Fatih‚Äôin ofisine yaptńĪńüńĪ bir ziyaretle teklifi geri √ßekmesi i√ßin ona baskńĪ yapar. Ancak Canan‚ÄôńĪn iŇüe d√∂nme konusunda ne kadar hevesli olduńüunu g√∂r√ľnce yaptńĪńüńĪndan piŇümanlńĪk duyan Selim, Canan i√ßin harekete ge√ßer. Selim‚Äôin sevdikleri i√ßin verdińüi √ßabayńĪ g√∂ren Akg√ľn √ßok etkilenir. Selim‚Äôe ihanet etmekle etmemek arasńĪnda, karar vermek zorunda kalacańüńĪ bir eŇüiktedir artńĪk.

ńįdealist Cumhuriyet SavcńĪsńĪ Selim Kara (Ali Atay), 8 yńĪl √∂nce hapse yolladńĪńüńĪ organize su√ß lideri Sel√ßuk TaŇükńĪn‚Äôdan (Arif PiŇükin) reddedemeyeceńüi bir teklif alńĪr. Sel√ßuk TaŇükńĪn, SavcńĪ Selim Kara‚ÄônńĪn b√ľt√ľn su√ß √∂rg√ľt√ľn√ľ √ß√∂kertecek davasńĪnda, tanńĪklńĪk yapmayńĪ istemektedir. Ancak bunun i√ßin tek bir ŇüartńĪ vardńĪr; ońülu Akg√ľn G√∂kalp TaŇükńĪn‚ÄôńĪ (Alperen Duymaz) Selim Kara‚ÄônńĪn bizzat korumasńĪ‚Ä¶ Su√ß d√ľnyasńĪ i√ßinde b√ľy√ľm√ľŇü, tehlikeli ve sorunlu g√∂r√ľn√ľm√ľn√ľn ardńĪnda duygusal bir gen√ß olan Akg√ľn i√ßin bu kabul edilmesi g√ľ√ß bir durumdur. Hayat beklemedińüi bir yerden daha sńĪnar Selim‚Äôi; ńįzmir‚Äôde √ßocuklarńĪ ile yaŇüayan eŇüi Canan (Funda Eryińüit) boŇüanmak istemektedir. Ailesi ile iŇüi arasńĪnda kalan SavcńĪ Kara, baŇü belasńĪ olarak g√∂rd√ľńü√ľ Akg√ľn‚Äô√ľ ailesinin yanńĪna ńįzmir √áeŇüme‚Äôde bulunan Adalet Sitesi‚Äône g√∂t√ľrmek zorunda kalńĪr. Selim‚Äôin beklenmeyen misafiri Akg√ľn‚Äô√ľn geliŇüi site sakinlerinin t√ľm dengelerini alt√ľst edecek; Ege‚Äôde baŇülayan bu r√ľzg√Ęr, herkesin hayatńĪnńĪ deńüiŇütirecek b√ľy√ľk bir fńĪrtńĪnaya d√∂n√ľŇüecektir.

snippet.description:
#EDielaShqiptare nga #ArditGjebrea prej vitit 2008 n√ę #TvKlan, programi m√ę popullor n√ę t√ę gjitha familjet shqiptare √ßdo t√ę diel√ę. Nj√ę program i cili p√ęrfshin nj√ę fash√ę orari maraton√ę, prej 6 or√ęsh transmetim.

Pasi u nda nga partneri i saj n√ę Shqip√ęri nga ku erdhi n√ę jet√ę dhe nj√ę djal√ę, ajo udh√ętoi drejt Amerik√ęs tek prind√ęrit nga ku e nisi jet√ęn nga e para. Ajo menaxhonte nj√ę dyqan t√ę motr√ęs s√ę vet√ę dhe aty u njoh edhe me Paolon bashk√ęshortin e saj.

Ai kishte ardhur si turist p√ęr t√ę ndjekur finalen e Brazilit she shkonte shpesh tek dyqani i Brun√ęs q√ę blinte buk√ę dhe pas nj√ę jave ishte ndeshja finale Brazil-Franc√ę dhe ai e ftoi n√ę nj√ę party q√ę kishin organizuar brazilian√ęt. Ajo shkoi dhe Paolo e prezantoi at√ę si e dashuria e tij dhe aty nisi historia e dashuris√ę s√ę tyre.

Ardit Gjebrea: Po me djalin ishte miq√ęsor, si sillej?

Bruna: Pasi ram√ę dakort q√ę do krijojm√ę nj√ę lidhje, un√ę me ato traditat shqiptare i thash√ę do vish t√ę m√ę k√ęrkosh tek babi dhe tha po patjet√ęr. Babi tha ti nuk m√ę d√ęgjove her√ęn e par√ę do m√ę d√ęgjosh her√ęn e dyt√ę? K√ęshtu q√ę vazhdo b√ęj √ßfar√ę t√ę duash. Paolo ishte turist dhe u kthye n√ę Brazil. Un√ę mendoja se ishte di√ßka kalimtare sepse ky do ik√ę n√ę Brazil, ka jet√ęn e vet√ę dhe nuk do kthehet m√ę, por pas nj√ę muaji ai u kthye dhe un√ę shkova n√ę Miami e prita, kam udh√ętuar gjith√ę nat√ęn me makin√ę, ai vine n√ę or√ęn 7 t√ę m√ęngjesit.

Erdhi p√ęr mua dhe q√ę at√ę dit√ę ne kemi bashk√ęjetuar p√ęr 1 vit ku b√ęm√ę dhe shpalljen e fejes√ęs, pastaj b√ęm√ę dasm√ę, pastaj pas nj√ę viti erdhi vajza. Kemi nj√ę vajz√ę 21 vje√ßare, djali √ęsht√ę 28 vje√ß dhe ka nj√ę vajz√ę, k√ęshtu q√ę jam dhe gjyshe. √čsht√ę ndjesia m√ę e bukur n√ę bot√ę.

Ardit Gjebrea: Un√ę nuk kam par√ę gjyshe m√ę t√ę bukur n√ę bot√ę.

Bruna: Faleminderit.

Bruna tregon se bashk√ęshorti i saj √ęsht√ę dashuruar me Shqip√ęrin√ę dhe d√ęshiron q√ę t√ę jetoj√ę k√ętu. Ajo √ęsht√ę parukiere n√ę Florida ka sallonin e saj, f√ęmij√ęt, familjen dhe √ęsht√ę e v√ęshtir√ę q√ę t√ę shk√ęputet nga aty, por Paolo ka sakrifikuar p√ęr t√ę 23 vite, ka b√ęr√ę √ßfar√ę ajo ka dashur dhe p√ęr k√ęt√ę arsye sot n√ę studio do i thot√ę se pranon t√ę jetojn√ę n√ę Shqip√ęri. /tvklan.al

snippet.title: Starship | SN9 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
On Tuesday, February 2, Starship serial number 9 (SN9) completed SpaceX‚Äôs second high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype from our site in Cameron County, Texas.

Similar to the high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 8 (SN8), SN9 was powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee ‚Äď approximately 10 kilometers in altitude. SN9 successfully performed a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.

The Starship prototype descended under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship‚Äôs attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. During the landing flip maneuver, one of the Raptor engines did not relight and caused SN9 to land at high speed and experience a RUD.

These test flights are all about improving our understanding and development of a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.

snippet.description:
Bu dizi ve √ßok daha fazlasńĪ puhutv'de ‚Üí https://puhutv.com/kuzey-yildizi-ilk-ask-detay?utm_medium=referral&utm_source=youtube&utm_campaign=kuzey_yildizi_ilk_ask&utm_content=detay

Kuzey YńĪldńĪzńĪ "ńįlk AŇük"a abone olmak i√ßin ‚Üí http://bit.ly/kzy-yldz-dd-sub

Kuzey‚Äôle YńĪldńĪz; bir k√∂pr√ľn√ľn √ľst√ľndeki iki inat√ßńĪ ke√ßi, aynńĪ denizin iki hńĪr√ßńĪn dalgasńĪdńĪr. YńĪldńĪz, Kuzey‚Äôi, kendini bildi bileli sevmektedir. Ondan baŇükasńĪnńĪ g√∂z√ľ g√∂rmemiŇütir. Aileler de birbirinin can dostu olduńüundan Kuzey‚Äôle YńĪldńĪz‚Äôa ivedilikle birer s√∂z y√ľz√ľńü√ľ takńĪlńĪr. Amma ve lakin, Kuzey, √ľniversite okumak i√ßin ńįstanbul‚Äôa gittińüinde t√ľm s√∂zlerini unutur, yeni aŇüklara yelken a√ßar.

Bu durum, ailesi ve YńĪldńĪz tarafńĪndan √∂ńürenildińüinde ise Kuzey, kendi ailesi dahil k√∂ydeki herkes tarafńĪndan aforoz edilir. ArtńĪk Kuzey‚Äôin ne bir memleketi, ne de bir ailesi vardńĪr. YńĪldńĪz, Kuzey‚Äôini, g√∂ńü√ľn√ľ ayakta tutan direńüini, bildińüi tek y√∂n√ľn√ľ kaybetmiŇü, kalbine √ßakńĪlan bir kazńĪkla √∂ylece kalakalmńĪŇü, bunun acńĪsńĪnńĪ, bir an olsun unutmamńĪŇütńĪr. 

Kuzey, aŇüńĪk olduńüu kadńĪnla evlenmiŇü, √ľ√ß √ßocuk sahibi olmuŇütur ama YńĪldńĪz‚Äôa yaŇüattńĪńüńĪnńĪ tam yirmi sene sonra yaŇüamńĪŇü, terk edilmiŇü; √ľstelik dolandńĪrńĪlńĪp sńĪfńĪr noktasńĪna gelmiŇütir. Kuzey, yńĪllar √∂nce binbir umutla geldińüi ve hayallerini, en g√ľzel g√ľnlerini yaŇüadńĪńüńĪ Ňüehri, √ľ√ß kńĪzńĪyla birlikte terk edip memleketine d√∂nmeye karar verir. 

KńĪzlarńĪyla birlikte kendisini dońüduńüu topraklara kabul ettirecek, ettiremese de gitmeyecek, orda kalacaktńĪr. Ama YńĪldńĪz, onu geldińüi yere g√∂ndermeye, onu d√∂nd√ľńü√ľne piŇüman etmeye yeminlidir. ńįŇüin i√ßine bir de biri gen√ß kadńĪnlńĪńüńĪn eŇüińüinde, biri ergenlińüin doruklarńĪnda, dińüeri de √ßocuk yaŇüta √ľ√ß tane kńĪz √ßocuńüu ve Kuzey y√ľz√ľnden birbirine d√ľŇüman olmuŇü iki aile eklenince olaylar kontrol edilemez bir hal alńĪr.

Kuzey gitmemeye, YńĪldńĪz affetmemeye, aileler de barńĪŇümamaya yeminlidir. Bu inat hikayesinden en √ßok inat eden, pes etmeyen galip √ßńĪkacaktńĪr. Ňěimdilik kimsenin pes etmeye niyeti yoktur.

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong ‚Äď Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
¬†
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, ‚ÄúGodzilla vs. Kong,‚ÄĚ the next epic adventure in Legendary‚Äôs cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in ‚ÄúGodzilla vs. Kong‚ÄĚ as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titans‚ÄĒinstigated by unseen forces‚ÄĒis only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsg√•rd (‚ÄúBig Little Lies,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúThe Little Drummer Girl‚ÄĚ), Millie Bobby Brown (‚ÄúStranger Things‚ÄĚ), Rebecca Hall (‚ÄúChristine,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúProfessor Marston and the Wonder Women‚ÄĚ), Brian Tyree Henry (‚ÄúJoker,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúSpider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse‚ÄĚ), Shun Oguri (‚ÄúWeathering with You‚ÄĚ), Eiza Gonz√°lez (‚ÄúFast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw‚ÄĚ), Julian Dennison (‚ÄúDeadpool 2‚ÄĚ), with Kyle Chandler (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters‚ÄĚ) and Demi√°n Bichir (‚ÄúThe Nun,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúThe Hateful Eight‚ÄĚ).
Wingard (‚ÄúThe Guest,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúYou‚Äôre Next‚ÄĚ) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (‚ÄúThor: Ragnarok‚ÄĚ) and Max Borenstein (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúKong: Skull Island‚ÄĚ), story by Terry Rossio (‚ÄúPirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales‚ÄĚ) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters‚ÄĚ), based on the character ‚ÄúGodzilla‚ÄĚ owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

Dińüer yandan Rafet Pala, okulu y√∂netme iŇüini eŇüi Refika Pala‚Äôya bńĪrakmńĪŇütńĪr. Refika HanńĪm, ilk iŇü olarak KasńĪrga ve Mavi Ay‚ÄôńĪ yeni ok√ßuluk hocalarńĪ Cihangir ile tanńĪŇütńĪrńĪr. Giovanni‚Äôyi bir anda karŇüńĪsńĪnda g√∂ren ńįskender, durumdan Ňü√ľphelenir ve onun tekkede birlikte eńüitim aldńĪńüńĪ Cihangir olduńüu konusunda ńĪsrar eder. ńįskender‚Äôin s√∂ylediklerini ink√Ęr eden Giovanni, okul takńĪmńĪ se√ßmelerinin kendi g√∂zetiminde yeniden yapńĪlacańüńĪnńĪ salńĪk verir.

Ayberk, ńįskender‚Äôin s√ľper g√ľ√ßleri olduńüuna KasńĪrga‚ÄôyńĪ ikna edebilecek mi? ńįskender, yeni ok√ßuluk hocalarńĪnńĪn tekkedeki Cihangir olduńüunu ispat edebilecek mi? Okul takńĪmńĪ se√ßmelerini yeniden yapacańüńĪnńĪ s√∂yleyen Giovanni‚Äônin aklńĪndan ge√ßenler ne? Cihangir‚Äôin gelmesi, Mavi Ay‚ÄôńĪn okul takńĪmńĪna se√ßilebilmesi i√ßin yeni bir Ňüans olabilir mi?

T√ľm bu sorularńĪn yanńĪtńĪ ve daha fazlasńĪ, Tozkoparan ńįskender‚Äôin altńĪncńĪ b√∂l√ľm√ľnde.

Nilg√ľn‚Äô√ľn kapńĪsńĪnńĪ √ßalan gizemli kiŇüi kim? 

Kutlusay Malikanesi‚Äônde ge√ßen zor gecenin ardńĪndan Selim‚Äôin kendisine Biricik‚Äôin saatiyle ilgili imalńĪ sorular sormasńĪ Serra‚ÄôyńĪ yaralar. Selim, NazlńĪm‚Äôla konuŇüup ger√ßeńüi √∂ńürenince

kulak misafiri olur. Burak ve Biricik, Serra konusunda tartńĪŇüńĪr. Burak, Biricik‚Äôe Serra
yenilgisini kabul etmesini s√∂ylerken, kendisi de bu entrikalardan 
yavaŇü yavaŇü sńĪkńĪlmaya baŇüladńĪńüńĪnńĪ hissettirir.  

Ger√ßeńüi √∂ńürenen Selim su√ßluluk duygusuyla periŇüan olur. Serra‚Äôya kendini affettirmek i√ßin 
var g√ľc√ľyle √ßabalayńĪp √∂fkesini yatńĪŇütńĪrmaya √ßalńĪŇüńĪr ancak Serra kendisine yapńĪlmńĪŇü bu hakareti kabullenemez.

snippet.title: Emanet 110. B√∂l√ľm FragmanńĪ | Legacy Episode 110 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
